source=docs
mode=supported
kind=run

docs_urls=https://github.com/actions/cache;https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/dependency-caching-reference
added_at=2026-03-13
notes=fail-on-cache-miss makes a cache miss fail while continue-on-error still exposes failure outcome and success conclusion
